name.description: The name of the security profile group resource.

description.description: An optional description of the profile. The Max length is 512 characters.

labels.description: A map of key/value label pairs to assign to the resource. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

threat_prevention_profile.description: Reference to a SecurityProfile with the threat prevention configuration for the SecurityProfileGroup.

custom_mirroring_profile.description: Reference to a SecurityProfile with the custom mirroring configuration for the SecurityProfileGroup.

custom_intercept_profile.description: Reference to a SecurityProfile with the CustomIntercept configuration.

location.description: The location of the security profile group. The default value is `global`.

parent.description: The name of the parent this security profile group belongs to. Format: organizations/{organization_id}.
